subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-20 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: He is a gifted child. From their earliest years children reveal whether they are gifted or not. In Mazandaran We had a brother, Mirza 'Ali-Muhammad, who hath passed away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طفل باهوشی است.  اطفال از کوچکی پیدا است که باهوشند یا نه.  در مازندران برادری داشتیم میرزا علی محمد، فوت شد
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @stories; anecdotes, @business; financial; property matters
